BOUT OIL EALTH ARD (cid:) Hon’ble Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi has launched PMFBY on 19th February, 2015 (cid:) Aim of Soil Health Card : SHM aims at promoting Integrated Nutrient Management (INM) . through judicious use of chemical fertilisers including secondary and micro nutrients in conjunction with organic manures and bio-fertilisers for improving soil health and its productivity Strengthening of soil and fertiliser testing facilities to provide soil test based . rreeccoommmmeennddaattiioonnss ttoo ffaarrmmeerrss ffoorr iimmpprroovviinngg ssooiill ffeerrttiilliittyy Ensuring quality control requirements of fertilisers, bio-fertilisers and . organic fertilisers under Fertiliser Control Order, 1985 Up gradation of skill and knowledge of soil testing laboratory staff, . extension staff and farmers through training and demonstrations Promoting organic farming practices etc. . (cid:) The Mission Coordinator: Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Government of India

(SHC) ? HAT IS OIL EALTH ARD Swasth Dhara, Khet Haraa (cid:) SHC is meant to give each farmer soil nutrient status of his holding and advice him on the dosage of fertilizers and also the needed soil amendments, that he should apply to maintain soil health in the long run. (cid:) SHC is printed report that farmer will be handed over for each of his holdings. It will contain the status of his soil with respect to 12 parameters, namely ,, (Macro-nutrients) ; (Secondary- nutrient) ; Zn, Fe, Cu, Mn, Bo (Micro - nutrients) ; and pH, EC, OC (Physical parameters). Based on this, the SHC will also indicate fertilizer recommendations and soil amendment required for the farm.

SHC ? OW CAN FARMER USE (cid:) The card will contain an advisory based on the soil nutrient status of farmer’ holding. (cid:) It will show recommendations on dosage of different nutrients needed. Further, it will advise the farmer on the fertilizers and their quantities he should apply, and also the soil amendments tthhaatt hhee sshhoouulldd uunnddeerrttaakkee,, ssoo aass ttoo rreeaalliizzee ooppttiimmaall yyiieellddss.. (cid:) It will be made available once in cycle of years, which will indicate the status of soil health of farmer’ holding for that particular period. The SHC given in the next cycle of years will be able to record the changes in the soil health for that subsequent period.

OIL AMPLING ROCEDURE Norms of sampling: (cid:) Soil samples will be drawn in grid of . ha in irrigated area and 10 ha in rain- fed area with the help of GPS tools and revenue maps. Who will take the sampling: (cid:) The State Government will collect samples through the staff of their Department of Agriculture or through the staff of an outsourced agency. The State Government may also involve the students of local Agriculture / Science Colleges. Ideal Time for Sampling: (cid:) Soil Samples are taken generally two times in year, after harvesting of Rabi and Kharif Crop respectively or when there is no standing crop in the field.

OW OIL AMPLES BE OLLECTED FROM ’ : ARMER IELD (cid:) Soil Samples will be collected by trained person from depth of 15- 20 cm by cutting the soil in “” shape. (cid:) It will be collected from four corners and the centre of the field and mixed thoroughly and part of this picked up as sample. Areas with shade will be avoided. (cid:) The sample chosen will be bagged and coded. It will then be transferred to soil test laboratory for analysis.

OCATE OIL ESTING ABORATORY Step : Go to Soil Health Card Website Step : Scroll down the website & Go to Locate soil testing laboratory Step : Entre your State name, District name & Find the List of Soil Testing Laboratories available in Your District. Website Link: https://soilhealth.dac.gov.in/
Sample: List of Soil Testing Laboratories in Surat District, Gujarat Sate

OLE OF NNAT HARAT BHIYAN ARTICIPATING NSTITUTE (cid:) Step : Visit and meeting with Agriculture officer and Soil Testing Laboratory and understand the Soil Health Card Scheme. (cid:) Step : Conduct surveys and identify the need of Soil Health Card in UBA adopted villages. (cid:) Step : Work with Gram Panchayat & Taluka Pnachayat / District Panchayat Department for implementation of Soil Health Card scheme in adopted UBA Village cluster.

For more details visit & meet with Soil Testing Laboratory Officer, Gram Talati / Taluka Agriculture Officer @ Taluka (Block) Panchayat / District Agriculture Officer, District Panchayat The details are also available in following document: . Annexure FAQ_Final_English
